description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests and Linting that runs on push and pull request events for specific files and directories. The workflow should have two jobs: unit-tests and linting. The unit-tests job should run on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, install dependencies, and run unit tests with pytest. The linting job should depend on unit-tests, run on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, install dependencies, and lint the code with pylint.
